title: The Regal Mutt - Chewy Twists with Chicken - 1kg Bag
features: DOG CHEWS NATURAL – Our chewy twists with chicken chews are a natural dog chew made from chicken and rawhide. As they are made from chicken and beef cattle hide they are very low in calories, making an ideal diet treat.
GREAT TREATS FOR DOGS - Our chewy twists with chicken make an ideal snack for your dog.
DOG DENTAL SUPPORT - Our dog chew sticks are a great dental aid, regular chewing these helps to keep your dog’s teeth healthy. They can assist with tartar control for dogs.
GREAT VALUE - Value pack of 1kg of Chewy Twists with Chicken, the dimensions of each chew are 127mm long.
SUPPORTING DOG RESCUE CHARITIES – Over £40,000 raised for dog rescue charities !
description: Product Description £40,000 Raised for Dog Rescue Charities About Us - The Regal Mutt is a bit different to most other companies. Not only do we sell quality products, but we have also made a difference by donating over £40,000 to dog rescue charities. Charity Donation - The donations made by our company have supported dog rescue charities to carry out their amazing work, that is rescuing and taking care of dogs that need their help. The costs of running a dog rescue charity quickly add up, for example, kennels, vets fees, food, etc.. and so every penny helps. Quality Products - We have provided our customers with quality products, while supporting charities that have made a difference. Unlike many other companies our business model has taken an ethical approach, with the aim of growing the business steadily while supporting our four legged friends. The Regal Mutt - Chewy Twists With Chicken (1kg Bag) Description: These Chewy Twists with Chicken are made with super duper tasty 100% natural chicken breast meat so are sure to become one of your dog's favourite treats. Packed in a handy, re-sealable bag, as well as being tasty they are full of natural goodness too as they are made with 100% natural human grade chicken breast meat; only 2% fat; high in protein; wheat and cereal free - ideal for sensitive tummies; contains no artificial nasties such as colours, flavours or preservatives; delicately roasted to perfection to preserve the real flavour of the chicken; great treat for dogs of all sizes. The chewy texture of the rawhide also makes these tasty treats great for your dog's dental hygiene. Ingredients: Chicken 67%, Rawhide 31%, Glycerin, Tapioca Starch, Salt. Quantity & Weight: Each 1kg bag contains approximately 85 chicken twist chews.
